question: The line chart shows site visits by year from 2018 to 2022. Which of the following statements is correct based on the chart?

options.A: Site visits stayed about the same from 2020 to 2022.
options.B: Site visits in 2022 were the highest, but the exact value is not fully visible because the top of the line is clipped.
options.D: Site visits in 2018 and 2019 were identical.

explanation: The visible y-range is set below the maximum value, so the top bars are truncated and looks identical.
